title: Dead Ends
desc: Manu, an awkward young man, tries to reconnect with his teenage crush during a road trip deep in the forest.

title: Zombie Elementary
desc: A little girl who's afraid of everything must come to her brother's aid when a friend turns their school into the walking dead.

title: Red Skies
desc: This is Film - Horror Category.

title: Bird Lady
desc: A girl wanders for miles, shoeless and confused, until she stumbles on a house full of birds and the old lady who cares for them.

title: Storage
desc: An unforgettable, award-winning horror. A woman wakes up in a strange basement with no recollection as to how she got there. That's when she discovers that she's not alone.

title: Animal Behaviour
desc: Five animals meet regularly to share their problems in group therapy sessions led by Dr Clement, a canine psychotherapist.

title: Break The Mould
desc: An unapologetic woman is ready to break the mould by questioning and changing the narrative of who she has been conditioned by society to become.

title: All Is Well
desc: This short documentary has a look at the world of 'Well of Death', at the life of the bikers in their world of brazen.

title: Dusk
desc: A young Nepalese sex worker in the red light district of Kolkata heads out with her intimate client to watch the sunset over the river.

title: Pause
desc: A regular taxi ride through Mumbai turns mysterious as the driver and his passenger argue about life, relationships and loss.

title: Fikkr - Poetry On No Smoking
desc: Fikkr is a tragic poetry about the after effects and the grievances of a family when a tragedy hits as a result of smoking.

title: The Waiting Room
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Tell Tale Wank
desc: A pair of prospective parents are waiting for a social service representative to interview them about adopting a baby, and that is when they find a corpse in the bathroom.

title: How Can I Forget
desc: A multiple award-winning, unique twist on the rom-com. A chance encounter between two people takes a magical and romantic turn when they realise that they share the same unusual ability.

title: Curiosa
desc: A woman tries to learn more about her boyfriend and deepen their relationship. However, the more she learns, the more she comes to regret the endeavour.

title: Isabel
desc: An estranged couple are brought back together for their daughter's wedding, but the unavoidable presence of their past reopens old wounds, allowing historic mistakes to be renewed.

title: Swahaa
desc: Two Poets Of Different Generations And Schools Of Thought Come Together.

title: We Can Hear the Same Music
desc: A heartfelt tale of romance and technology. A man who is non-verbal and blind woman express their feelings for each other through AI and music.

title: Silent Treatment
desc: A man and a woman become interested in each other when they meet in a hospital. As they start interacting through gestures and scribbles, the man discovers that his new friend is aurally impaired.

title: Thieving Around
desc: A young couple break into a house in order to impersonate the lives of the homeowners.

title: New Bombay Cafe
desc: An ageing woman reminiscences about her incomplete love story in a forgotten cafe, as her past lover takes his final breath.

title: Crawl Space
desc: This is Film - Horror Category.

title: Lang Syne
desc: On Christmas Eve, former partners Daniel and Jillian cross paths in a convenience store and reminisce about their past relationship.

title: Painful Imprints
desc: Nathalie is overqualified but unemployed and is harangued by her mother to settle down so she makes a drastic choice. A touching drama from Kouemo Auguste Bernard.

title: Baghdad Express
desc: A young girl working in her father's Arabic restaurant is forced to decide which comes first, her dreams or her family.

title: Toto
desc: A nonagenarian woman falls in love with a robot while training the device to prepare her favourite delicacy. However, her dreams are shattered after the robot undergoes a routine software update.

title: Consciousness
desc: A woman finds herself in a state of coma after a car crash and sees fleeting glimpses of her past experiences emerge, interspersed within the landscape of her inner world.

title: Pasta
desc: A man and a woman eat pasta. They express their love and their heartbreak, they approach and they distance themselves, all while a waiter brings them more pasta.

title: Last Day
desc: A hired killer accepts a contract to eliminate a target, a beautiful woman. He decides to romantically persuade her rather than resort to violence.

title: Last Of The Wild
desc: A thought-provoking documentary. Game of Thrones star Kristofer Hivju and adventurer Fredrik Strang explore the Whanganui River, the first river to achieve personhood.

title: Colour
desc: This is Documentary - Others Category.

title: The Way We Are
desc: A couple confronts hidden memories, revealing truths to each other and themselves, embarking on a transformative journey of self-discovery.

title: Policeman Special
desc: Abeer Kashyap, a troubled officer, takes up the missing case of two people who were last seen at a restaurant. Upon investigating, it is revealed that the owner of the restaurant is the prime suspect.

title: Devil's Reflection
desc: In a town in Mexico, a young student named Isabel accidentally breaks a collection of old mirrors. This unleashes Aluca, an evil spirit that leads its victims to suicide.

title: El Aura Azul
desc: In the mountains of Medellin, Colombia, Sasha has a strange day at the pool. However, her evening takes a dark turn when she realises that someone or something is following her.

title: The Covidiot
desc: A man who dismisses the risks of the Coronavirus gets into an argument with a stranger and is eventually forced to see the deadly consequences of his denial.

title: Un Minuto
desc: A strange Skype call threatens to destroy the lives of a young Spanish couple. A claustrophobic horror with a modern technological twist from Miguel Alcalde.

title: The Scent Of Fear
desc: A lonely young woman finds herself haunted by her fears and cannot escape the clutches of the Shadow which surrounds it.

title: Dead Ends
desc: Manu, an awkward young man, tries to reconnect with his teenage crush during a road trip deep in the forest.

title: Zombie Elementary
desc: A little girl who's afraid of everything must come to her brother's aid when a friend turns their school into the walking dead.

title: Red Skies
desc: This is Film - Horror Category.

title: Decision
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Voicee
desc: A local criminal accidentally sets Voicee, an AI created for military use on loose. The test voice commanding application spreads to other phones and makes him perform dangerous tasks.

title: Destiny
desc: A clock-obsessed man wakes up to a perfect routine, only to be hit by a bus. He awakens again, seconds behind his previous self, facing a relentless loop where he must save himself or repeat his fate.

title: Friday Night
desc: Three rich teenage girls sneak off to paint the town red. When their taxi ends up on the outskirts of town, they not only have to deal with the Indian underclasses, but also with each other.

title: 10x10 Ft
desc: This is Film - Drama Category.

title: Neem Jamun
desc: A young boy and his grandmother go on a journey despite family disapproval.

title: Steel Will
desc: A multiple award-winning cyberpunk sport drama. A boxer loses an arm in a car wreck so a mechanical one is grafted on in its place but future fights may cost him his family and humanity.

title: Counting Backwards
desc: A tragic incident from Sally's past is ruining her relationship with her daughter. Soon, a guilt-ridden friend of Sally decides to help heal the duo's broken relationship.

title: Unexpected Item
desc: Sometimes you get more than you pay for, but life advice from a self-service check-out is probably the strangest deal you'll get in the supermarket today.

title: A Ghost Story
desc: A caregiver pays a final visit to a terminally ill individual during the pandemic lockdown. During his final moments, he recounts the story of encountering a gentle ghost.

title: Pop
desc: Stephen Graham stars in this gripping drama. A young boy is exploring his identity, when he befriends a local man, recently released from prison. However, his past may endanger them both.

title: Charlie Surfer
desc: A charming, multiple award-winning documentary. A filmmaker follows Charlie Clay, a young boy with Asperger's syndrome, as he spends the summer learning to surf.
